red_green_verification.method: Temporary local revert of the src/strategic/FGame.cpp counting block to pre-fix logic; rebuilt and ran the suite; then restored via git checkout (no source revert committed).

acceptance_criteria_validated: S2: destroyed Sathar fighters counted toward m_lostSatharShips
S3: fighters excluded from tenday counters on both UPF and Sathar sides
S3: militia-fleet ships excluded from tenday counters on both sides
S3: non-fighter, non-militia ships still counted on both sides
checkForVictory() condition-5 boundary uses filtered counts (positive win case and complementary negative no-victory case)
